description_long: This is a heavily armored, tracked combat tactical vehicle featuring a large central turret with a prominent main cannon and several secondary weapon mounts. The vehicle's body is angular and robust, with reinforced armor plating covering all sides, and it rides on wide, rugged tracks suitable for urban and rough terrain. The turret is equipped with multiple barrels and sensor arrays, and there are additional weapon systems mounted on the sides and front. The vehicle's exterior is finished in a dark, solid color with no visible camouflage or military markings. The design suggests a focus on firepower, protection, and urban combat capability, with hatches and access points likely for crew entry and maintenance. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some composite elements and visible mechanical details.
description: A large, tracked, heavily armored combat vehicle with a central turret, multiple weapon mounts, and a dark, solid exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, reinforced frontal armor, central turret, and side-mounted weapon systems.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the main cannon, the height of the turret, and the full length of the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, exhaust or engine components, and rear access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the turret profile, side weapon mounts, and track details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon on the central turret, two side-mounted guns on each side of the hull, and additional smaller mounts on the front and turret sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel and composite armor plating; sloped and reinforced on the front, sides, and turret.
